notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the dotnet6.0 SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.2. It addresses 6 CVEs: CVE-2023-46233, CVE-2024-0056, CVE-2024-0057, CVE-2024-43483, CVE-2024-43484, and 1 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
